prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan SR20DET (Red Top, 205hp stock) with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, Tomei 260° cams, and a Nismo 74mm throttle body for high-RPM power delivery, paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring a HKS Hi-Power Spec-L muffler and a Tomei 4-2-1 header for optimized scavenging

Full chassis reinforcement using a Cusco bolt-in 4-point roll cage (AD Expert-specific fitment) and a Nismo front strut tower bar (part #40100-31U00) to reduce flex, combined with Tein Flex Z coilovers (AD Expert-specific valving) and Whiteline 22mm adjustable rear sway bar (part #BKR95XZ) for balanced handling

Fuel system upgrade with a Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors, and a Sard 800cc top-feed fuel rail, controlled by a Haltech Elite 1500 ECU with a custom AD Expert-specific harness and a Link G4+ wideband O2 controller for precise AFR tuning
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 aero kit (AD Van-specific fitment) with carbon fiber front bumper, overfenders, and a duckbill rear spoiler, painted in Nissan Racing Yellow (code: 415) with matte black accents for aggressive stance and reduced drag

Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2 wheels (15x8 +38 offset) wrapped in Yokohama Advan A052 semi-slick tires (195/50R15) for lightweight track-focused grip, paired with Nismo lug nuts (part #40400-31U00) and extended wheel studs for secure fitment

Interior stripped and reinforced with a Bride Zeta III reclining bucket seat (AD Expert-specific mounting brackets), a Nismo 350mm steering wheel (part #46100-31U00), and a Defi BF Amber boost gauge mounted in a custom A-pillar pod, with sound deadening removed and replaced with lightweight carbon fiber door cards and a Cusco shift knob (part #540 300 A)
